import io
import string
import list

fn insert(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut inserted = false
  while i < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(val)
      if not inserted and x <= val
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, val)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let line_opt = io.read_line()
match line_opt
when Some(line)
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < nums.len()
    match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      sorted = insert(sorted, x)
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      if k == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
